props.title: 🦈 MiroShark's Engine Reliability Has a Bus Factor of One — and It Isn't the Owner

props.text: every outside human PR MiroShark merged this week is Daniel Andersen's — a self-hoster in Hamburg. his open PR #214 is the first patch since May proposing to change how simulation_runner.py actually runs (dead-loop, asyncio-starving env.step, dead-worker detection). aaronjmars merged 14 PRs and none touched the engine runtime. the owner ships tooling around the engine; an outsider fixes the engine.
